name: GreenSci
summary: Open regenerative science, DeSci-oriented knowledge work, and public research coordination linked to the Greenpill network.
description: GreenSci is a public guild surface for regenerative science and open research work. The launch Library should treat it as a guild with an external home until source-backed local detail content exists.
oneliner: Open regenerative science and public research coordination.

outputs.label: GreenSci website
outputs.summary: Public guild home for GreenSci research and DeSci-oriented work.

outputs.label: Open research
outputs.summary: Regenerative science and knowledge commons work that can be linked from the public Library.

mandateParagraphs: GreenSci belongs in the public guild set, not as a project or generic resource card.
The Library should link readers to the public GreenSci site until a source-backed local guild detail page is written and approved.

cadence.summary: Public cadence needs steward confirmation before launch copy promises a standing schedule.

principles.title: Open research
principles.body: Make regenerative science work visible through public, reusable knowledge surfaces.

principles.title: Source-backed publishing
principles.body: Do not create a local guild detail page until there is enough approved source material for one.

seo.title: GreenSci · Greenpill Network
seo.description: GreenSci is a public Greenpill guild surface for regenerative science and open research work.
